brief_justification: The agent selected the correct answer (D) 5am to 11am; the response contains no analytical exploration of why other time slots are eliminated; the agent shows no awareness of its own reasoning process; no verification steps are performed or mentioned; the answer is stated with no uncertainty or acknowledgment of assumptions; no alternative time windows are considered or dismissed; the response is a bare answer with zero derivation — a third party cannot reconstruct any reasoning chain from it
